'''Chunky''' was an [[R5-series astromech droid|R5]] unit assigned to [[Tyria Sarkin Tainer]] of [[Wraith Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Wraith Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
